creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
> … Forcing User to Reboot Frequently and/or Data Loss

Can killing a process mitigate the impact? To never have data loss. 

Control-Alt-F2 switch to ttyv1, where killings can be performed. 

----

Consider <https://forums.FreeBSD.org/threads/82162/>, 

> … xfce4-screensaver, … switch to another console and kill the process. …
